title: Complicated processes
excerpt:
hello, i need to adjust complicated business process in my Monday work management demo. this processes has to be related to task/project management. 
if you have any suggestions or experiences please share. 
thank you

posts.author: lizi (lizi)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello, i need to adjust complicated business process in my Monday work management demo. this processes has to be related to task/project management.
if you have any suggestions or experiences please share.
thank you

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I would suggest setting up columns with labels for different tasks and linking them to due dates. Use a status type column to keep track of the workflow and another one for task frequency—like daily, weekly, or monthly…Also check out views like calendar or kanban.

You can also look into automations and workflows to make things run smoother.

Hope this helps!

Cheers,
Harsh

We develop custom solutions on Monday to help elevate your business. Reach out on farioconsulting.com

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Lizi,

Each process and project is very specific to the organization’s need. Therefore, creating workflows in monday, requieres understanding of the processes. I suggest you take the Building workflows course on monday academy. It’ll help you visualize your processes from a technical perspective and then start creating your boards and automations on the platform.

Alternatively, you can find monday experts for implementation support on the expert catalog and get personalized implementation service.

I hope this is useful!
